thead.font-family: "Instrument Sans", Inter, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif

thead th.background: rgb(17, 17, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.font-family: "Instrument Sans", Inter, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif

video.font-family: Lora, Georgia, "Source Han Sans SC", "Source Han Sans CN", "Noto Sans CJK SC", 思源黑体, "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif
